characters.name: Ruby Braithwaite
characters.subtitle: The Spell-Slinger
characters.look: Sharp bob of auburn hair framing intense green eyes. Tailored wool suit with a knee-length skirt, practical oxford heels. Silver pendant at throat. Expression switches between scholarly concentration and reckless determination. Moves with the confidence of someone who's memorized every incantation.

equipment.name:
The Guy Fawkes
[aka Hydra's Bile]
(Molotov Cocktail)
equipment.tags: close, magic, fire, area, obvious, loud

additionalMoves.name: Spell-Slinger Luck Special
additionalMoves.description: When you spend Luck, the official council of wizards is going to poke their nose into your business.

additionalMoves.name: Combat Magic
additionalMoves.description: You have a few attack spells you can use as weapons. When you use these spells for Necessary Violence, roll +Occult instead of +Vigor. Sometimes the situation may require you to Act Under Pressure to cast your spell without problems. Your combat spells can combine any of your base spells with any of your effects.

arrays.title: Bases
values: Ball: 1-harm, magic, area, close, obvious, loud

arrays.title: Effects
values: Fire: Add '+2 harm fire' to a base. If you get a 10+ on a combat magic roll, the fire won't spread.

arrays.title: Combat Options
values: You gain the advantage: take +1 forward, or give +1 forward to another hunter.
You force them where you want them.
You make them lose something important.

additionalMoves.name: Tools and Techniques
additionalMoves.description: To use your combat magic effectively, you rely on a collection of tools and techniques. Cross off one; you'll need the rest.

arrays.title: Options
values: Consumables: You need certain supplies—powders, oils, etc—on hand, some will be used up each cast. If you don't have them, take 1-harm ignore-armour when you cast.
Foci: You need wands, staves, and other obvious props to focus. If you don't have what you need, your combat magic does 1 less harm.
Gestures: You need to wave your hands around to use combat magic. If you're restrained, take -1 ongoing for combat magic.

additionalMoves.name: Third Eye
additionalMoves.description: When you Read A Bad Situation, you can open up your third eye for a moment to take in extra information. You can see invisible things.

outcomes.10+: Take +1 hold, for a total of 4 hold
outcomes.7-9: Take +1 hold, for a total of 2 hold
outcomes.6-: You may still get 1 hold, but you're exposed to supernatural danger. Unfiltered hidden reality is rough on the mind!

arrays.title: Hold Options
values: Are there any dangers we haven't noticed?
What's the best way to protect the victims?

additionalMoves.name: Practitioner
additionalMoves.description: Choose two effects available to you under Use Magic. Take +1 to Use Magic whenever you choose one of those effects.

additionalMoves.name: Shield Spell
additionalMoves.description: When you Protect Someone, gain 2-armour against any harm that is transferred to you. This doesn't stack with your other armour, if any.
